title: Grassy Egyptian Sea Bass Grill
description: A snappy and flavorful vegetarian-friendly dish featuring grilled sea bass fillets served with a tandoor-grilled vegetable skewer, inspired by the midnight cravings of the Egyptian streets.

ingredients.name: Tandoor spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Rinse the sea bass fillets under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Season the sea bass fillets with tandoor spice mix and salt.
Thread the vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the vegetable skewers for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until they're slightly charred.
Grill the sea bass fillets for 4-6 minutes on each side, or until they're cooked through and flake easily with a fork.
Serve the sea bass fillets with the grilled vegetable skewers on the side.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
